message:
perf: hot-path micro-optimizations + silent storage.put error handling

- Reuse module-level EMPTY_U8 instead of allocating new Uint8Array(0)
  per row in r2-spill.ts and operators.ts string encoding loops
- csv-reader inferType/coerceValue: hoist toLowerCase() before null
  check to avoid calling it twice per value on every row
- fragment-do/query-do: add .catch() to fire-and-forget storage.put()
  calls so rejected promises don't go unhandled
